risks.description: OMDS treated as UI library not governance
Most components don't exist in Contentstack
Key-resource roll-offs — migration/feature team ~Sept 10; most knowledgeable QE August
Linear (current-capacity) delivery will not meet year-end; full scope extends well beyond
risks.mitigationRequired: Four-squad parallel model + resource decision (DEC-016, ACT-064)

risks.description: Post-sign-off red-zone template changes cascade across content + code on all affected pages
Single points of failure — only Gareth & Natalie build templates; Bernice overloaded
Governance/template drift without controls (Contentstack ↔ Figma; new tenants)
risks.mitigationRequired: Gatekeeper gate + Figma source-of-truth + onboarding (DEC-019, ACT-075)

risks.description: Stakeholder sign-off delays extend template sign-off (esp. sequential Personal outreach)
risks.mitigationRequired: Structured engagement; group sign-off by page type (ACT-065, QST-025)

risks.description: Secure-web portfolio-view requirements unclear before Sept roll-off → planning blocked
Not all year-end goals will be delivered → sponsor expectation-management required
Country teams without dedicated content/design resources (OMAR) cannot self-migrate
risks.mitigationRequired: SA-first rollout + central support + squad extension (DEC-025)

risks.description: EasiPlus & dependent journeys blocked until Funeral/product pages complete

dependencies.description: Contentstack dev + content/assets/URLs signed off before publishing
Testing cannot begin until all pages built in Beta
DS V2 deployed to Beta (Find an Advisor + templates)
Figma/DS component audit before template scaling
URL audit before switch-off/redirect decisions
Content packs + cluster/SME content before sign-off
Cross Channels depends on Web Platform for FE from PI2
EasiPlus depends on Funeral template + MFC sign-off
SEO ≥2 months lead before QA
Tax-free & flexi-invest pages link to migrated V2 journeys
Service tree/dashboard solution for secure web
Paid Ads URL requirements from Group Marketing
Notify Nthabi of URL changes for GA tracking
Final advisor flow into beta (Luvuyo)
Security pen-test/crowdsource before go-live
ServiceNow API updates + approvals before prod
Personal IA + core templates + content guidelines complete before dev/build
Product pages complete before EasiPlus & dependent sales journeys deploy
IA sign-off per audience before each downstream stream proceeds (sequential)
Secure-web portfolio-view technical requirements before Sept roll-off
Template handover cadence (~every 2 weeks) feeds content creation & parallel builds
Desktop Figma output (source of truth) for automation & Contentstack mapping

decisions.title: Migration vs transformation
decisions.description: Define & bound programme scope: migration, transformation, or hybrid

decisions.title: Success metrics
decisions.description: Platform + customer success metrics (analytics, DS, <3s, NPS, traffic, etc.)

decisions.title: MVP
decisions.description: MVP = new navigation (4 audiences) + secure web IA

decisions.title: Migration dependencies
decisions.description: Identify & communicate dependencies + tasks per business area

decisions.title: Whiteboard -> plan
decisions.description: Per-workstream whiteboard → programme plan + RAID

decisions.title: Design foundations
decisions.description: IA, navigation, templates, content/SEO/brand standards

decisions.title: Handover governance
decisions.description: Approval routing & entry/exit gates between teams

decisions.title: Page treatment
decisions.description: Product pages → new templates; others as-is/restyled

decisions.title: Automated testing
decisions.description: Automated testing + DevOps pipeline enforcement

decisions.title: Dedicated publisher
decisions.description: Ring-fence dedicated migration publisher from BAU

decisions.title: SEO lead time
decisions.description: SEO team ≥2 months before QA for tagging & validation

decisions.title: Phased decommissioning
decisions.description: Turn off legacy components progressively as migrated

decisions.title: Faoli Bank separate brand
decisions.description: Bank as separate entity with own IA & governance

decisions.title: Phased audience-based delivery
decisions.description: Personal first (foundations end-June, section ~end-July), then Corporate → Business → Wealth (+Secure)

decisions.title: Four-squad parallel model
decisions.description: Four concurrent squads (one per audience): lead designer + designer + content + tech support

decisions.title: Template change-control
decisions.description: Post-sign-off red-zone changes trigger change management across content + code on all affected pages

decisions.title: DevOps quality gates + Playwright
decisions.description: DevOps quality gates + automated testing (Playwright) + linting before production; rollout end-June with reporting

decisions.title: Defer article/news URL structure
decisions.description: Defer article/news URL structure pending IA (target end-June); content audit + URL mapping per section as discovery deliverable

decisions.title: Bank owns its pages
decisions.description: Bank builds its own web pages; team involved only on bank-initiated redesign; confirm if OM finance pages move to bank

decisions.title: Personal foundations end-June
decisions.description: Sign off Personal IA + core templates + generic content guidelines by end-June

decisions.title: Content + analytics co-location
decisions.description: Co-locate content + analytics tagging in Contentstack to enable automation & SEO

decisions.title: Design-phase skip
decisions.description: Allow some teams to skip design phase (dependency-based)

decisions.title: Publishing gatekeeper gate
decisions.description: Design & publishing teams gatekeep; every page signed off before go-live; only trained builders publish; tenants onboarded to standards

decisions.title: Article & news handling
decisions.description: Single consolidated article page; interim background-colour variant; news distinct (~1-yr retention, stays in footer)

decisions.title: Country/site delivery model
decisions.description: Country teams own migration, depend on central for design/IA/nav/content; South Sudan = decommission-only; SA-first then roll out; small sites quick nav+footer retrofit

decisions.title: Tenant operating model
decisions.description: Post-migration tenants fund & manage own sites under formal partnership agreements

decisions.title: Unified Jira + cadence
decisions.description: Single Jira construct; leads enter milestones/priorities/deps/confidence; twice-weekly 30-min leadership check-ins + weekly playback

decisions.title: Red/green-zone templates
decisions.description: Modular templates: red zones (fixed/governed) + green zones (variable); 2-3 standardised product templates

issues.description: No reliable total page count; manual sheet tracking
Secure web incomplete; no service-tree solution
BA on medical leave; recruitment ongoing
Current under-resourcing across all workstreams; teams beyond capacity
Portfolio-view dependencies/requirements unclear for Secure Web; aggravated by Sept roll-off
Unclear business ownership for several journeys (compliments, complaints, unclaimed benefits, IR, corporate unclaimed benefits)
